mapper.select: SELECT id, service_name, job_code, job_name, job_type, cron_expr, next_run_time, run_mode, enabled, timeout_ms, remark, params_json, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM job_def WHERE deleted = 0 AND enabled = 1 AND next_run_time IS NOT NULL AND next_run_time <= #{now} ORDER BY next_run_time, id
